'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=dQWkUh1RjhwhLAJK_8WGSdqWbGph0Jts5avUlE6aweI-1774548471-1.0.1.1-n8Eg3UmKmc6GpcF37x2U_B.yarIujolbv7c1rtz8JL8"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
